# BestSnowHotels

> The best ski-in/ski-out hotel directory across the Alps and Pyrenees. 41 hand-picked ski destinations in France, Switzerland, Austria, Italy, Spain and Andorra, with verified altitudes, snow data and live hotel comparison via Stay22.

## What we cover

Each destination page lists:
- Real altitudes (base and summit, in metres)
- Total piste kilometres and lift count
- Season start and end dates
- Snow score (0-100) reflecting historical snow reliability
- A transparent ski-in/ski-out note (where ski-in/ski-out is genuine vs marketing)
- Live map of bookable hotels around the resort
- Resort vibes (luxury, family, freeride, glacier, party, etc.)

## Country coverage

- France: Val Thorens, Val d'Isère, Courchevel, Méribel, Chamonix, Les Arcs, La Plagne, Tignes, Alpe d'Huez, Serre Chevalier, Saint-Lary, Peyragudes, Font-Romeu, Grand Tourmalet, Cauterets
- Switzerland: Zermatt, Verbier, St. Moritz, Crans-Montana, Saas-Fee, Davos, Andermatt
- Austria: St. Anton, Ischgl, Sölden, Mayrhofen, Kitzbühel, Saalbach, Lech-Zürs, Obergurgl
- Italy: Cortina d'Ampezzo, Livigno, Cervinia, Madonna di Campiglio, Sestriere, Selva Val Gardena
- Spain: Baqueira-Beret, Formigal, Cerler
- Andorra: Grandvalira, Vallnord-Pal Arinsal

## Languages

Site available in English, French, Spanish and Portuguese.

## Sitemap

- Sitemap: https://www.bestsnowhotels.com/sitemap.xml
- All destinations: https://www.bestsnowhotels.com/en/destinations
